  • View page source

beak.methods.bnn.fastBNN module

beak.methods.bnn.fastBNN.apply_activation(x: Tensor, activation: str) → Tensor[source]

Apply specified activation function.

beak.methods.bnn.fastBNN.bayesian_network_forward(x: Tensor, core_unit: List, loc_head: List, std_head: List, trainable: bool = True) → Tensor[source]

Forward pass through the Bayesian network (core + loc and std heads).

beak.methods.bnn.fastBNN.build_bayesian_network(input_shape: int, core_units: List[int], head_units: List[int]) → Tuple[List, List, List][source]

Build a Bayesian network consisting of one core network and two heads (loc and std).

beak.methods.bnn.fastBNN.build_network(input_dims: List[int], output_dims: List[int]) → List[Tuple[Variable, Variable, Variable, Variable]][source]

Build a network by creating parameters for each layer.

beak.methods.bnn.fastBNN.calculate_total_kl(layers: List[Tuple[Variable, Variable, Variable, Variable]]) → Tensor[source]

Compute the total KL divergence loss for all layers.

beak.methods.bnn.fastBNN.create_layer_params(d_in: int, d_out: int) → Tuple[Variable, Variable, Variable, Variable][source]

Create layer parameters for weights and biases with initialization.

beak.methods.bnn.fastBNN.dense_layer_forward(x: Tensor, params: Tuple[Variable, Variable, Variable, Variable], trainable: bool = True) → Tensor[source]

Forward pass through a dense layer with optional perturbations.

beak.methods.bnn.fastBNN.fit_model(data_train, input_shape: int, core_units: List[int], head_units: List[int], lr: float, epochs: int, N: int) → Tuple[Tuple[List, List, List], ndarray][source]

Train the Bayesian density network and return the trained model parameters and metrics.

beak.methods.bnn.fastBNN.forward_layers(x: Tensor, layers: List[Tuple[Variable, Variable, Variable, Variable]], activations: List[str], trainable: bool = True) → Tensor[source]

Forward pass through a list of layers with corresponding activations.

beak.methods.bnn.fastBNN.forward_network(x: Tensor, layers: List[Tuple[Variable, Variable, Variable, Variable]], activations: List[str], trainable: bool = True) → Tensor[source]

Forward pass through a sequence of layers with activation functions.

beak.methods.bnn.fastBNN.initializer(shape: Tuple[int, int]) → Tensor[source]

Xavier initialization for weights.

beak.methods.bnn.fastBNN.kl_divergence(parameter: Tuple[Variable, Variable, Variable, Variable]) → Tensor[source]

Calculate KL divergence for a single layer.

beak.methods.bnn.fastBNN.negative_log_likelihood(y_true: Tensor, y_pred: Tensor)[source]

Calculate negative log likelighood.

beak.methods.bnn.fastBNN.predict_model(model: Tuple[List, List, List], data: ndarray, target_shape: Tuple[int, ...] | None = None, clip_pred: bool = True, norm_sd: bool = True) → List[source]

Generate predictions from the trained Bayesian density network.

beak.methods.bnn.fastBNN.set_global_seed(seed: int) → None[source]

Set the global random seed for reproducibility.
